sql: SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.user_id, p4.user_id FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p4 ON c1.post_id = p4.id UNION ALL SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.user_id, p4.user_id FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p4 ON c1.post_id = p4.id WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id = p4.id)

SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN users AS u9 ON c1.user_id = u9.id WHERE u9.id = 19 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u9 ON c1.user_id = u9.id WHERE u9.id = 19 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id = u9.id)

SELECT u1.email, c9.id FROM users AS u1 RIGHT JOIN comments AS c9 ON u1.id = c9.user_id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 INNER JOIN likes AS l3 ON u1.id = l3.user_id WHERE l3.post_id = 893
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u3 ON f1.follower_id = u3.id

SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p9 ON l1.post_id = p9.id WHERE p9.posted_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p9 ON l1.post_id = p9.id WHERE p9.posted_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id = p9.id)

SELECT * FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN follows AS f7 ON u1.id = f7.follower_id UNION ALL SELECT * FROM users AS u1 RIGHT JOIN follows AS f7 ON u1.id = f7.follower_id WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id = f7.follower_id)

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.email, u1.id, c2.comment_text FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN comments AS c2 ON u1.id = c2.user_id UNION ALL SELECT u1.country_code, u1.email, u1.id, c2.comment_text FROM users AS u1 RIGHT JOIN comments AS c2 ON u1.id = c2.user_id WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id = c2.user_id)

SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
